sn23.18:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Radha said to the Blessed One: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘of a selfless nature, of a selfless nature.’ What now, venerable sir, is of a selfless nature?"
sn23.18:1.2: "Form, Radha, is of a selfless nature. Feeling … sn.iii.197 Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is of a selfless nature. Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
